name: ​Mattel Disney and Pixar Toy Story 5 Woody Action Figure | 7-inch Playscale, 1 Key Character, 8+ Posable Joints, Movie-Accurate Design
bullets: ​The magic of Disney and Pixar's Toy Story! Bring the friendship and adventure of the movies home with these action figures of favorite characters. Each sold separately, subject to availability.
​Ready for fun! With true-to-film design and posable joints, these figures are ready to round up some fun.
​Pose-perfect! With 8 to 14 points of articulation, these figures are ready for dynamic poses. Re-enact scenes from the movies or imagine your own storylines.
​Play scale! These figures are designed at 7-inch scale, the perfect size for play. At scale means they're accurate in size to each other as they appear on screen, for realistic play or display.
​3 years and up! These figures are suitable for Toy Story fans ages 3 years and older.
description: Re-create the magic of Disney and Pixar's Toy Story movies with these posable action figures of the beloved characters at 7-inch Playscale, the perfect playable size. With 8 or more articulated joints and true-to-film design, these toys can re-enact signature moves and dynamic poses from the movies and fuel new storylines. Top fan-favorite characters are available, each sold separately and subject to availability. Collectors can create a unique showcase display! Suitable for Toy Story fans ages 3 years and older. Colors and decorations may vary.

reviews.name: Jerry hutto
reviews.title: Good quality and good price
reviews.body: Got exactly what I paid for!!My sisters son is going to love this as his birthday gift. Cant wait to surprise him this weekend!!!! Got a good look at it and it looks really good. Plus it was a good price.

reviews.name: Selena
reviews.title: Great Value for Price
reviews.body: Worth the $10, great quality and durability. My toddler throws this thing against the wall and tucks him in bed. Not a scratch yet. Super lightweight for a kid who just likes the figure without anything extra.

reviews.name: Jessica
reviews.title: Too cute and great price
reviews.body: Super cute, great size, the detail is pretty goodGreat price, got all 3 friends for my baby girl all ready for Toy Story 5! For the price I recommend!

reviews.name: Fox
reviews.title: Best toy story toys we have bought in years!
reviews.body: Action figures that are ready for ACTION. They are so simple and fun for little hands that play rough!My son turned three, and since he could speak, it was all toy story and buzz lightyear, all the time. He has been though a dozen of the buzz and toy story toys. You know the ones, made for older kids, buttons, lights, frustrating parts that break on the first drop.The astronaut helmet on the…
